def negative_environment_boundary_without_fallback():
    rule_id = "environment_boundary_without_fallback"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Environment-variable lookups that omit a default value or explicit failure handler."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
